title: The Winter I Almost Locked the Door
thesisOneSentence: The work of my hands was never the thing worth saving; the room and the people in it were, and letting one person see me struggling is what brought me back.
styleSignatureLine: The hiding is not protecting you. The hiding is the whole illness. (definition-drop signature for the Vulnerable engine)

arcBeats.beat: the honest cause, no single villain
the turn on the student stool
the closing image and the brave ask

transparencyBeatPlacement: Woven into the cold-open and the deepest-fear beat; never the raw consent language.
openingLine: I want to begin today with something I have never said out loud on this show.
finalLine: I will be here next week, with the light on, in every way that matters.
